channel.title: OnOptions
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from OnOptions, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: What’s open and closed on Presidents’ Day 2026? Federal holiday hours for Costco, Target, banks, stocks, more
item.description: For Americans with conventional work schedules, Monday holidays are often a blessing. However, despite the extra weekend day, these observances can al...

item.title: Job Hugging Is Slowing Your Team Down. Here’s How Smart Companies Fix It
item.description: The longer leaders mistake stability for commitment, the more momentum, growth, and performance quietly slip away.

item.title: How Do I Replace a Beloved Employee Who Died?
item.description: … and two other tricky workplace dilemmas.

item.title: Lowe’s CEO used to make $4.35 an hour working at Target. His secret to climbing the corporate ladder was volunteering for jobs ‘nobody else wanted’
item.description: “I had to find a way to differentiate myself,” Marvin Ellison said.

item.title: The Next Wow: What Tom Peters Saw Before the Rest of Us
Scientists Identified a Hidden Cause of Workplace Burnout—And Most Employees Do It Daily
item.description: Sometimes following the unwritten rules and expectations of the office is the least helpful thing to do.

item.title: While the U.S. marks Presidents’ Day, Lunar New Year begins for millions of Chinese Americans
item.description: In the United States, it’s one of our annual holidays today, Presidents’ Day, which celebrates the dozens of American presidents we’ve had over the ce...

item.title: This AI-powered machine turns photos into smells
item.description: Picture a memory from childhood, one that feels real and nostalgic, but somehow just out of grasp: perhaps a family trip to the beach, or a moment mid...

item.title: The skies for American Airlines are clearer than you think
item.description: Robert Isom is steering American Airlines through a very particular kind of turbulence.

item.title: AI is transforming science – more researchers need access to these powerful tools for discovery
item.description: Five years ago, our AlphaFold AI system solved the 50-year grand challenge of protein structure prediction. But that's not the whole story.

item.title: Victoria’s Secret CEO says new customers are embracing the escape provided by the glamorous brand: ‘We were living in a beige world for awhile’
item.description: Maximalism is back at Victoria's Secret.

item.title: The recent CEO turnover trend continues with three high-profile exits
item.description: Hello and welcome to Modern CEO ! I’m Stephanie Mehta, CEO and chief content officer of Mansueto Ventures. Each week this newsletter explores inclusiv...

item.title: Aspen is finally getting a second ski base village. It’s over 10 years in the making
item.description: After more than a decade of planning, an overlooked side of the ski haven of Aspen, Colorado, will soon be revamped into a new base village. Named Cha...

item.title: As baby boomers are forced to ‘unretire’ because they’ve not saved enough, 6-year-olds in Germany will soon have retirement accounts
item.description: Millions of baby boomers can’t afford to retire. It’s a fate that Gen Alpha in Germany may never have to face under new plans.

item.title: Jerry Seinfeld Says Lifelong Success Comes Down to Embracing This 1-Sentence Mindset
item.description: Best of all, Seinfeld’s mindset applies to any pursuit.
